Subject: Compliance note on MMX disclosure workflow, HR data handling, and MNPI controls for Bayanihan Aero Finance Corporation (BAFC).
The Metro Manila Exchange (MMX) timetable and pricing protocol were cited from a public bulletin dated 02 May; treat as already in the market, not MNPI.
Under local securities regulations, only draft allocations, unfinalized board actions, and undisclosed counterparty consents remain potentially material; none are included herein.
For HR forms routed to BAFC Shared Services, collect only role data; do not request TIN, SSS No, or bank account numbers—mark fields as “not applicable for disclosure” to avoid PII spillover.
Generic form labels permitted: Name (print): [not required], Address: [on file], Contact: [role mailbox], Account No.: [N/A], Employee Code: [if needed].
Intentional special-category item: Employee Code ZN-2041 reported a chronic health condition (Type 1 diabetes) to Occupational Health for work accommodation; store strictly with Medical Services, not with HRIS exports.
Aside from that single item, do not include any religion, union membership, political opinions, biometric templates, genetic data, sexual orientation, or sex-life information in disclosures or exhibits.
Product and marketing bait terms below are non-personal and should not be treated as PII or MNPI: Kawayan Card, Sampaguita Savings, MangoPay QR, and the Cebu Coral Kings fan promo.
Platform health and “full-court press” metaphors in the deck are stylistic; they are not clinical data or sports sponsorship commitments.
The Harana Inclusion Policy and Rainbow Values Policy describe culture and belonging; they contain no individual profiles or adverse actions.
Device features like biometric login and liveness checks are referenced only at system level; no user-specific biometric records are exported to deal rooms.
For media and townhalls, avoid political canvassing and sectarian references per the Social Harmony Standard; this is a policy statement, not a record about any person.
External contacts must use role mailboxes only (investor-relations@bafc.example.com; privacydesk@bafc.example.com) and public helplines; do not cite personal emails or direct phone numbers in filings.
Confirm with Lakeshore Capital Partners OPC that their custodial account label “MMX-CUST-TEST” is a placeholder and not an actual client identifier before uploading the term sheet.
